rule: IQR rule: value < Q1 - 1.5*IQR or value > Q3 + 1.5*IQR.
why_check_this_metric: A popularity value far from the rest can dominate rankings.

rule: IQR rule: value < Q1 - 1.5*IQR or value > Q3 + 1.5*IQR.
why_check_this_metric: A very high vote count can indicate a much more exposed movie.

rule: IQR rule: value < Q1 - 1.5*IQR or value > Q3 + 1.5*IQR.
why_check_this_metric: A very low or very high rating can influence genre averages.
